title: Kazakhstan's Central Bank Plans to Invest Up to $350 Million in Crypto-Related Assets
message_html: Kazakhstan's Central Bank Plans to Invest Up to $350 Million in Crypto-Related Assets ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): According to Reuters, Kazakhstan’s central bank plans to invest up to $350 million from its gold and foreign exchange reserves into crypto-related assets, including shares of crypto-linked tech firms and index funds, with the program expected to begin in April or May.
